titleStmt.title: SII 34.3: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 3. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājādhirāja I, 27th year Rhishabha, ba. di. 6, Thursday, Śravaṇa = A.D. 1045, May 9, Thursday.

The mahāsabhā of Gaṅgaikoṇḍchōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam sold some land to the temple of Tirumaṇañjēri after making it tax-free dēvadāna, for which they received money from the temple. One Ñānaśivar was asked to take possession of the land and arrange for the stipulated services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiṅkaḷErtaru
cēṉai
kaḷiṟṟōṭu
karumuraṭ cāṅkamayaṉum
r cuṭar poṉṉo
taṉṉāṭaiyiṟ jayaṅkoṇṭu
yuḷḷeri maṭuttu vicaiya
vallavar mutaliṉar
ṉeṉṉum Uyarnta perum pukaṭ kōvirājakēsari pa[ nmarā]
ṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirāja devarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Ā
vatu rājēndrasiṅha vaḷanāṭṭu
kaṅkai koṇṭa cōḻac caruppēti maṅkalattu
mahāsabhaiyOm Ivvāṭṭai ṛṣabha nāya
ṟṟu Aparapakṣattu viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum ṣaṣṭiyum
peṟṟa tiruvōṇattiṉāṉṟu pakal tirumaṇañcēri
mahādevar kOyil muṉpil tirumuṟṟa
ttu kūṭiyiruntu paṇippaṇiyāl
ttu tirumaṇañcēri
śaṇḍeśvara devar pakkal nāṅ
kaḷ cantrātittaval Iṟaiyili
ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu
ṟum mūṉṟāñ ciṟakil Ittēva
r nilamāy muṉṉūṟṟuva viḷā
ka meṉṟu pēr kūvappaṭṭa nila
m Araiyēy Araikkālum
Itiṉāl tiruvulakaḷantaruḷipu
kka nilamum Akappaṭac cantrā
tittaval Iṟaiyiliceytu
kuṭuttōm Iṉṉi
kīḻ pāṟkellai Irā
cāmi kramavittaṉ pakkal
ttukku mēṟkum teṉpāṟke
llai Uṭciṟu vāykkāluk
ku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkel
lai muṉ cuṭṭiṉa
ṇṇāṟṟukku kiḻakkum
laiyuṭ kuḻi 1000 4 100 8 10 8(1/4) Ik kuḻi Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Eṇpatteṭṭēkālilu mikutik kuṟai Uḷḷiṭaṅkavumin nilattil mēnōkkiya maramum kiṇōkkiya kiṇaṟum paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭaiy vaṭakkil kavuṇiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉ kālālē pāyavu
m vāravum maṟṟu meppēṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum viṟṟu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 3 10 1 Ik kācu muppattoṉṟuṅ koṇṭu viḷai nilattukkum vāykkālukkun taramili puṉceyk kollaikkum vanta peruvari cilvari Eppērppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷun tiruvācalil pōnta kuṭi
maikaḷum nāṅkaḷē cantirātittavaṟ Iṟukkavuñ ceyyavuñ kaṭavōmākavu minnilañ tēvarkaḷukku muṟcollappaṭṭa nivantaṅkaḷukkum ñāṉacivarumi
varvaṟkattāru muṉṉiṟ māheśvararumē Iṟaiyiliyē cantirātittavar Aṉupavikkap peṟuvarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭikko
ḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākavu mipparicu cētu It tēvarkku vilai yiṟaiyilipiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttōmi mahāsabhaiyōm sabhaiyuḷiruntu paṇittār
Digital edition of SII 34.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
